title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Smartworks

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Smartworks
jsonLd.description:
Smartworks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Smartworks:
Smartworks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartworks!
